goal: Optimize battleV2 balance values (AI planning aggressiveness and round-end safety), produce a concrete tuning plan, and self-check with project gates.
constraints: Keep the active card pool baseline at 170 and do not alter card source chain.
Do not perform broad architecture refactors; only make targeted numeric/logic tuning in battleV2 flow.
Document every tuning item with gameplay meaning and expected impact.
Run self-check commands and record outputs in a project-facing report.
deliverables: Updated battleV2 tuning values and end-condition safeguards in source code.
A planning document describing tuning rationale, gameplay interpretation, and acceptance targets.
A self-check report with executed commands and observed results.
